name: Healthcare
short: Promoting preventive care, health awareness and access to quality healthcare for all.
description: Access to essential healthcare is a right, not a privilege. VAF works to bring basic health services, awareness programs, and medical support to communities that have historically been underserved by the formal health system.
points: Free health check-up camps and community outreach
Free medicine distribution for the underprivileged
Maternal and child health awareness sessions

name: Education
short: Empowering minds through quality education, digital literacy and skill development.
description: Quality education is the most powerful tool for breaking cycles of poverty. VAF runs learning support programs, drives access to schools and materials, and supports children and youth through their educational journey.

name: Environment
short: Protecting our planet through sustainable practices, conservation and community participation.
description: Healthy communities need healthy ecosystems. VAF's environmental programs focus on conservation, sustainable practices, and building awareness around the environmental challenges that directly affect our partner communities.

name: Community Development
short: Building resilient communities through empowerment, inclusion and sustainable livelihoods.
description: Social and economic empowerment completes the picture. VAF's development programs focus on building livelihoods, supporting women's empowerment, and creating pathways to economic independence for individuals and families.
